name: Codex Agent Standards
summary: Repository-local AGENTS.md now defines Codex operating rules, safety boundaries, language standards, platform standards, and source anchors.
details: Hermes automation added a root AGENTS.md so future Codex runs have a durable local instruction contract. The file covers small reversible changes, run locks, secret handling, official documentation lookup, Conventional Commits, targeted verification, programming standards, Discord bot concerns, Docker/Kubernetes guidance, and Hermes/Mythos/Camelot memory expectations. A static contract test guards the most important standards and primary source links.
sector_links: 10. Testing, QC, Grading, Mutation, GitHub Automation
action_items: Open a PR for the AGENTS instruction contract.
Consider wiring AGENTS.md into broader foundation checks after review.
Refresh source anchors when project standards or platform docs change.
